info.name: API Testing - 3 Years Experience Level
info.description:
A Postman collection designed for testers with ~3 years of API testing experience. Covers real-world testing scenarios including CRUD workflows, auth flows, contract testing, pagination, search/filter/sort, boundary testing, security checks, performance assertions, data-driven patterns, end-to-end workflows, and advanced scripting.

APIs Used:
- JSONPlaceholder (https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com)
- ReqRes (https://reqres.in/api)
- httpbin (https://httpbin.org)

item.name: 01 - Authentication & Authorization
item.description: Real-world auth testing: successful login, failed login, token extraction, using tokens, registration validation.

exec: pm.test('TC02 - Error message mentions missing password', function () {
pm.test('TC02 - No token is returned', function () {
pm.test('TC03 - Error message mentions missing email/username', function () {
pm.test('TC03 - No token is returned', function () {
pm.test('TC04 - Error object is present', function () {
pm.test('TC05 - Response has id and token', function () {
pm.test('TC05 - Token length is reasonable', function () {
pm.test('TC06 - Error indicates missing password', function () {
pm.test('TC06 - No id or token returned', function () {
pm.test('TC07 - Authenticated flag is true', function () {
pm.test('TC07 - Token matches stored token', function () {

item.name: 02 - CRUD Operations with Validations
item.description: Complete Create, Read, Update, Delete flow with field-level validations, data type checks, and response structure assertions.

item.name: TC10 - Create resource with all fields

item.name: 03 - Pagination & Data Integrity
item.description: Testing paginated responses, page boundaries, total count consistency, and data integrity across pages.

pm.test('TC18 - Pagination metadata still present', function () {

item.name: 04 - Contract & Schema Testing
item.description: JSON schema validation, contract testing to ensure API responses match the agreed-upon structure.

pm.test('TC20 - List response matches schema', function () {

pm.test('TC21 - Body is not empty/whitespace', function () {

item.description: Testing query parameter based filtering, searching, and verifying sort order.

item.name: 06 - Performance & Response Time
item.description: Response time assertions, delayed response testing, and performance benchmarking.

pm.test('TC27 - Data is still valid despite delay', function () {
pm.test('TC28 - Large response still under 5s', function () {

item.name: 07 - Headers, Cookies & Content Types
item.description: Testing custom headers, cookies, content negotiation, and different response formats.

pm.test('TC30 - Client version header sent', function () {
pm.test('TC32 - Body contains XML declaration', function () {

item.name: 08 - End-to-End Workflow
item.description: A complete CRUD workflow chaining requests together: Register → Create → Read → Update → Delete → Verify deletion. Simulates real-world testing flow.

item.name: 09 - Data-Driven & Dynamic Testing
item.description: Pre-request scripts to generate random data, dynamic variables, conditional test logic.

exec: var names = ['Alice QA', 'Bob Tester', 'Charlie Dev', 'Diana SDET', 'Eve Automation'];
var jobs = ['QA Engineer', 'SDET', 'Test Lead', 'QA Manager', 'Performance Tester'];

pm.test('TC33 - Job is a non-empty string', function () {

item.description: Testing edge cases, boundary values, special characters, empty payloads, and unusual inputs.
